decision.summary: No open position needs management; open the March 30 BTC $67k dip Yes market.
decision.rationale: There are no existing BTC positions to close or reduce. The latest transcript and recent summaries keep Beecthor macro bearish, with the rebound/squeeze into the 67k-70k zone seen as corrective before renewed downside; Binance confirms that rebound has already extended, with BTC at 67845.83 after trading as high as 68042.3. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest bearish downside market is `will-bitcoin-dip-to-67k-on-march-30`, and its 53.0% Yes probability is inside the preferred range and aligned with the thesis, while farther downside and monthly March markets are less immediate or too weakly priced. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.

details.market: Will Bitcoin dip to $67,000 on March 30?
